claim: Project Telos has a seventeenth-wave Lean replay rung package that compiles a bounded typed finite-grid summation-by-parts theorem file for the Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry proof-packet ladder, preserves prior Lean receipt source hashes, refreshes typed-grid/formal-verification arXiv source leads, demotes those leads to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY, updates website and official-copy surfaces, and keeps smooth periodic integration by parts NOT_REPLAYED and the parent Navier-Stokes problem UNVERIFIABLE.
scope: Local seventeenth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is a Lean replay for a typed finite-grid integer identity, not smooth periodic integration by parts, not smooth-field formalization, not PDE correctness, not finite-volume convergence, not physical-fluid validation, not source-body review of arXiv papers, not exhaustive literature coverage, not native BuildLang relation-invariant support, and not an accepted publication.
